name: Banana Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the bananas with 100 grams of castor sugar and lemon juice, then add the flour and mix to a thick paste.
2. Heat oil in a small pan until it smokes, then turn the heat to low. Using two teaspoons, drop one teaspoon of dough into the oil at a time, working no more than six puffs at a time.
3. Turn the puffs over for 2 minutes, keeping them moving continuously. Remove with a slotted spoon, drain on paper towels, and roll in cinnamon and sugar.
4. Serve with jam.
